rationale: Empirical checks support approval. `mindspec validate plan 108-cleanup-frontmatter-perf-wave2` exits 0 with the expected single R=0.10 decomposition-scope advisory. The plan frontmatter decomposes into contiguous chunks 1..4, every `depends_on` is empty, and `key_file_paths` are disjoint across chunks. B1's merge-forward preconditions match the tree: `internal/next/beads.go` has zero `findRoot` hits, the three stale unparam carve-outs plus the live `validateReviewMode` carve-out are still present in `.golangci.yml`, and `trace.Event.MarshalJSON` still exists pre-implementation. Three sampled verification commands are runnable and green. The disclosed post-approval spec-formatting commit only changes colon/dash/list-marker structure around Impacted Domains and attribution notes; prose content is unchanged.

findings.detail: Plan validation exited 0 with only `decomposition-scope-redundancy: R=0.10 below threshold 0.15`, matching the brief.
Parsed work_chunks are ids 1,2,3,4; all dependencies are empty; no duplicate key_file_paths appear across chunks.

`grep -c findRoot internal/next/beads.go` returned 0; `.golangci.yml` still contains `brownfield/plan`, `isNeighbor`, `findRoot`, and `validateReviewMode`; `internal/trace/event.go` still defines `Event.MarshalJSON`.

Spot-ran `go build ./internal/trace/`, `go test ./internal/contextpack/ -v -run 'TestContextPackDeterministic$' | grep -q -- '--- PASS: TestContextPackDeterministic'`, and `go test ./internal/contextpack/ -v -run 'TestContextPackFlatVsCanonicalByteIdentical$' | grep -q -- '--- PASS: TestContextPackFlatVsCanonicalByteIdentical'`; all exited 0.
`git show 9a9359ee -- .mindspec/specs/108-cleanup-frontmatter-perf-wave2/spec.md` shows only mechanical colon/dash and bullet-marker formatting changes in Impacted Domains; I found no prose change.
